title: elatine hydropiper var. hexandra
intro: Elatine hydropiper var. hexandra, also known as water wort, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the Elatinaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of water wort are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Water wort can be prepared as an herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and promote digestion.
